summary: All features verified working. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%) including new auto-detect language test. Frontend: All 8 features tested successfully - login flow, emoji display, click-to-reveal with translation + original, click-again back to emoji mode, language selector with Auto option, no diamond symbols, smart polling preserves state.

accessibility_warnings.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent components

react_warnings.issue: Cannot update a component while rendering a different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage)
react_warnings.note: Known issue from previous iterations - not blocking functionality

tests: POST /api/translate with target_language='auto' correctly uses user's preferred language
API returns language field matching user's preferred_language setting
POST /api/translate with target_language='bg' translates English to Bulgarian
Response includes translated text in Bulgarian

web_login_flow.details: Login with konstantin_sabev@abv.bg works, redirects to /chat

web_emoji_display.details: Emojis display correctly in chat (👋😊, 🤔❓, etc). No diamond ◆ symbols.

web_click_to_reveal_translation.details: Clicking emoji message shows: 1) Translated text (e.g. 'hey'), 2) Globe icon + 'Original:' label, 3) Original text below (e.g. 'хей'), 4) 'tap for emoji' hint

web_click_again_back_to_emoji.details: After reveal, clicking again returns to emoji mode. 'tap to reveal' hint reappears.

web_language_selector_auto_option.details: Language selector dialog shows 'Auto' option with 🌐 globe and 'Auto-detect' label at top of list

web_smart_polling_preserves_state.details: Revealed state preserved during 8-second wait (multiple polling cycles). State remained 'revealed' throughout.

critical_code_review_comments: EmojiRevealCard.jsx correctly implements click-to-reveal with direct onClick handler (line 36-63)
Translation happens on first reveal via POST /api/translate with userLanguage prop
Toggle state: isRevealed switches between emoji mode and revealed mode correctly
LanguageSelector.jsx has auto option at top: { auto: { name: 'Auto-detect', flag: '🌐', native: 'Auto' } }
Backend /api/translate handles 'auto' by falling back to user's preferred_language (line 1514-1515)
seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation conv_1fdb73670c42 with Yordan containing emoji messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Click-to-reveal shows translated text + original below with 'tap for emoji' hint, 2) Click-again returns to emoji mode with 'tap to reveal' hint, 3) Language selector has Auto option (🌐) at top, 4) Backend /api/translate handles 'auto' target_language by using user's preferred_language. Minor React warnings in LoginPage and DialogContent accessibility are non-blocking legacy issues.
